name: hyper-waterfall
description: Discover Hyper-Waterfall workflows and lifecycle checks in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Issue-first waterfall workflow guardrails for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Use Hyper-Waterfall workflow entrypoints, lifecycle checks, and fallback guidance from Codex without making the plugin a new canonical source.
defaultPrompt: Use Hyper-Waterfall to start the current GitHub issue workflow.
Use Hyper-Waterfall to check whether this repository should be initialized or updated.
